# Molavi Agent Skills

A curated repository of AI Agent Skills and Model Context Protocol (MCP) server configurations maintained by [Taghi Molavi](https://molavi.pro). It contains **277 unique, deduplicated agent skills** and setup guides designed for Antigravity, Codex, Cursor, and Claude.

## Core Resources

- [README](README.md): Primary repository guide and index of all skills.
- [Token Optimization Guide](docs/token-optimization.md): Practical guidelines for minimizing token consumption, range reads, AST-first search, and precise diffs.
- [Agent Installation Guide](docs/agent-installation.md): Step-by-step instructions for local and global skill installation, and for configuring database, SEO, and AI-visibility MCP servers.
- [Skill Quality Checklist](docs/skill-quality-checklist.md): Safety and quality standards for contributors adding new skills.

## Categories of Curated Skills

- **Web Development**: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Svelte, Astro, Inertia, SSR.
- **Backend & Databases**: Python, PHP, Node.js, Go, Rust, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Neon.
- **DevOps & CI/CD**: Docker, Terraform, GitHub Actions, AWS/GCP best practices.
- **AI & Integrations**: OpenAI, Claude, Gemini API, RAG, Vector databases.
- **SEO/AEO/GEO**: Technical SEO audits, AEO visibility, GEO optimization.
